# DevOps AI by RainTech

> DevOps AI is an enterprise-grade, AI-orchestrated MSP control plane that transforms managed services delivery with 15 operational zones, 55+ process areas, human-in-the-loop safety, and full data sovereignty.

## Key Facts
- Product: DevOps AI
- Company: RainTech
- Location: 3 S Tejon St., Suite 400, Colorado Springs, CO 80903
- Deployment: Azure Managed Application via Azure Marketplace
- Deployment Time: Under 35 minutes
- Architecture: Zero-trust, Azure-native, private endpoints
- Data Sovereignty: All data stays in client's Azure tenant
- AI Model: Azure OpenAI Service (within client tenant)
- HITL Gates: L0 (Automated), L1 (Notify), L2 (Approve), L3 (Human-only)

## Zones (15)
- Z1: Service Desk — AI ticket triage, SLA prediction, dispatch optimization
- Z2: Projects — CAB governance, migration command center, phase-gated execution
- Z3: Security Operations — Incident response, EDR/XDR, PAM, dark web monitoring
- Z4: GRC & Compliance — Multi-framework evidence, OSCAL, CMMC SSP builder
- Z5: Network Operations — SLO management, topology visualization, capacity forecasting
- Z6: Endpoint Management — Intune integration, fleet lifecycle, vulnerability management
- Z7: Accounting — Billing reconciliation, contract lifecycle, revenue recognition
- Z8: Relationships — CRM, pipeline management, QBR preparation, churn detection
- Z9: vC-Suite — vCIO, vCTO, vCISO, vCCO advisory engines
- Z10: Analytics — Cross-domain BI, churn prediction, NL queries
- Z11: DevOps — Feature flags, A/B testing, SRE golden signals
- Z12: Learning — LMS, AI tutoring, certification tracking, knowledge store
- Z13: Organization — Department hierarchy, multi-tenant admin, branding
- Z14: People — Onboarding, access lifecycle, workforce analytics
- Z15: Legal — Contract analysis, regulatory monitoring, data privacy

## Compliance
HIPAA, CMMC Level 2, SOC 2, NIST SP 800-53, ISO 27001, GDPR, CCPA, CIS M365 Benchmark
